faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Huguenot, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Huguenot due to the neighborhood's wooded areas, proximity to Conference House Park, and abundance of residential properties with accessible food sources. faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Huguenot home?
faqs.answer: Most raccoon removal projects in Huguenot are completed within 3-7 days, though timeline varies based on the situation. We typically conduct an initial inspection within 24 hours of your call, set humane traps immediately, and begin exclusion work once all animals are removed. faqs.question: Do you offer raccoon prevention services in Huguenot?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Prevention is a critical part of our raccoon control service. We seal all entry points, install protective barriers on vulnerable areas like roof vents and chimneys, trim overhanging branches, and provide recommendations for securing garbage and removing attractants specific to Huguenot properties.
